description: Post-implementation review: gather artifacts, run checks, panel review, synthesize verdict

steps.description:
Gather all implementation artifacts for epic {{epic}}.

Project root: {{project_root}}
Test command override: {{test_command}}
Build command override: {{build_command}}

1. Run `bd show {{epic}}` to read the plan/design
2. Run `bd children {{epic}}` to list child tasks
3. Run `git diff HEAD~1 --stat` (or appropriate range for all epic commits)
4. Run `git diff HEAD~1` for full diff
5. Auto-detect and run tests (or use {{test_command}} if provided)
6. Auto-detect and run build (or use {{build_command}} if provided)

Auto-detect test runner:
- package.json with test script -> npm test
- pytest.ini or pyproject.toml with pytest -> pytest
- Cargo.toml -> cargo test
- Makefile with test target -> make test

Write results to this issue's notes as JSON:
{"files_changed": [...], "additions": N, "deletions": N, "test_result": "pass|fail|skipped", "test_output": "...", "build_result": "pass|fail|skipped", "build_output": "...", "plan_summary": "..."}

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After gathering all artifacts and writing notes, stop.
steps.title: Gather implementation artifacts for {{epic}}

steps.description:
Run automated pattern checks on the implementation diff.

Project root: {{project_root}}

Read the gather step's notes for the diff and changed files.

1. Load checks from (cumulative, earlier wins on ID collision):
   a. {project_root}/.claude/rules/*.md (parse anti-pattern tables)
   b. {project_root}/CLAUDE.md (parse Implementation Checks table)
   c. ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (global Implementation Checks table)

2. Apply default checks:
   - no_debug_code: console.log, debugger, print.*DEBUG, TODO.*REMOVE in diff
   - no_secrets: API_KEY, SECRET, PASSWORD, PRIVATE_KEY in diff
   - no_incomplete_markers: TODO, FIXME, XXX, HACK without bd issue reference

3. For each check, search the diff. Record matches with file:line.

Write results to this issue's notes as JSON:
{"checks_run": N, "checks_passed": N, "checks_failed": [{"id": "...", "file": "...", "line": N, "match": "...", "reason": "..."}]}

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After running all checks and writing notes, stop.
steps.title: Pattern checks on {{epic}} diff

steps.description:
Read {{project_root}}/reviewers.yaml and select 2-3 reviewers for implementation review.

Read the gather step's notes to understand what was changed.

RULES:
1. Select 2-3 reviewers matching the changed code's domain
2. MUST include Claude for anti-pattern detection
3. Prefer code_technical reviewers for implementation review
4. For scientific code, include one technical_domains reviewer

Write result to this issue's notes as JSON:
{"panel": [{"name": "...", "domain": "...", "focus": ["..."]}], "reason": "..."}

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After writing panel JSON to notes, stop.
steps.title: Select implementation review panel for {{epic}}

steps.description:
Read select-panel notes to find YOUR assigned persona (panel[0]).
Read gather notes for artifacts. Read check-patterns notes for automated findings.

Adopt that persona. Review the implementation at {{project_root}}.

Focus on:
- Does implementation match the plan? (read plan via `bd show {{epic}}`)
- Code quality from your domain perspective
- Any automated check failures that need human judgment

You have full tool access. Read code, run tests, verify behavior.
Do NOT use Edit or Write on project files.

Write your review to this issue's notes.

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After completing review with specific findings and recommendation (approve/revise/reject), write notes and stop.
steps.title: Implementation reviewer 1 for {{epic}}

steps.description:
Read select-panel notes to find YOUR assigned persona (panel[1]).
Read gather notes for artifacts. Read check-patterns notes for automated findings.

Adopt that persona. Review the implementation at {{project_root}}.

Focus on:
- Does implementation match the plan? (read plan via `bd show {{epic}}`)
- Code quality from your domain perspective
- Any automated check failures that need human judgment

You have full tool access. Read code, run tests, verify behavior.
Do NOT use Edit or Write on project files.

Write your review to this issue's notes.

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After completing review with specific findings and recommendation (approve/revise/reject), write notes and stop.
steps.title: Implementation reviewer 2 for {{epic}}

steps.description:
ROLE: Claude anti-pattern detector.

Read gather notes for artifacts. Read check-patterns notes for automated findings.
Read ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md and {{project_root}}/CLAUDE.md for all rules and anti-patterns.

Check the diff for:
1. CLAUDE.md anti-pattern violations (the entire Anti-Patterns table)
2. Debug code, print spam, presentation cells
3. Incomplete markers (TODO/FIXME/sorry/admit) without bd issues
4. Security issues (OWASP top 10)
5. Files that should not have been modified (outside task scope)

Do NOT use Edit or Write on project files.

Write your review to this issue's notes.

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After completing anti-pattern scan with specific findings, write notes and stop.
steps.title: Claude anti-pattern review for {{epic}}

steps.description:
ROLE: LEAD SYNTHESIZER. Read notes from ALL preceding steps.

Epic: {{epic}}

Decision rules:
- ANY automated check failure (check-patterns) that wasn't explained by a reviewer: REJECTED
- Tests fail: REJECTED (unless reviewer explains why failure is expected/transient)
- 2+ reviewers recommend reject: REJECTED
- 1 reviewer recommends reject with specific evidence: REJECTED
- All reviewers approve but with suggestions: APPROVED with notes
- All reviewers approve clean: APPROVED

Write verdict to this issue's notes as:
VERDICT: APPROVED|REJECTED|INCOMPLETE
Then structured summary with each reviewer's key finding.

After writing verdict:
- APPROVED: run `bd comments add {{epic}} "IMPL-REVIEW APPROVED: <summary>"`
- REJECTED: run `bd comments add {{epic}} "IMPL-REVIEW REJECTED: <specific fixes>"`
- INCOMPLETE: run `bd comments add {{epic}} "IMPL-REVIEW INCOMPLETE: <what's missing>"`

STOPPING CONDITIONS: After writing verdict and running bd comments, stop.
steps.title: Synthesize implementation review verdict for {{epic}}

epic.description: Epic bead ID whose implementation is being reviewed
